title: Beille 100% Cotton Kitchen Dish Cloth and Tea Towels Set, Machine Washable, 5pk
description:
Beille’s 5pc Tea Towel and Dish Cloth Set includes four tea towels and one dishcloth in coordinated blue periwinkle patterns designed for everyday kitchen use. Made from soft cotton, these reusable kitchen linens are suitable for drying dishes, wiping counters, handling light spills, and baking prep tasks. The classic blue-and-white designs complement a variety of kitchen styles, while the machine-washable fabric allows for convenient cleaning and repeated daily use. Ideal for kitchens, apartments, entertaining spaces, and general household cleanup.

Beille 100% Cotton Kitchen Dish Cloth and Tea Towels Set, Machine Washable, 5pk
Bring classic color and everyday function to your kitchen with the Beille 5-piece Tea Towel and Dish Cloth Set. Designed with assorted soft blue periwinkle patterns, this coordinated set includes four tea towels and one dishcloth, giving you a practical mix of kitchen linens for drying dishes, wiping counters, handling light spills, and adding a polished decorative touch to any kitchen. The blue and white designs blend beautifully with farmhouse, coastal, cottage, and traditional kitchen decor.

Made from 100% cotton fabric, these kitchen towels are soft, reusable, and dependable for daily use. Keep them near the sink for dish drying, fold them over an oven handle for easy access, use them during baking prep, or keep the dishcloth handy for quick countertop cleanups. The assorted patterns make the set feel elevated, while still being useful for everyday kitchen tasks.

This great value set is machine washable for simple care and repeated use. Instead of reaching for disposable paper towels for every small spill or drying task, these reusable cotton kitchen towels offer a practical option for busy households, apartments, entertaining spaces, pantries, butler kitchens, and general, everyday food and meal prep. Wash, reuse, and rotate the towels throughout the week to keep kitchens looking clean and organized.

Whether you are drying glassware, lining a bread basket, wiping down a kitchen island, or refreshing your kitchen linen collection, this Beille kitchen towel set is a versatile kitchen essential.
Key Features
  • 5PC KITCHEN TOWEL SET: Includes four tea towels and one dish cloth in assorted soft blue patterns, giving you a coordinated kitchen linen set for drying dishes, wiping counters, baking prep, cleanup and everyday kitchen use
  • 100% COTTON FABRICATION: Made from soft cotton for a reusable and practical kitchen tea towel and dish towel option; ideal for drying hands, cleaning countertops, handling light spills and more
  • ASSORTED BLUE PATTERNS: Classic blue and white designs add a fresh touch to farmhouse, coastal, cottage, and traditional kitchens, while still offering everyday dependable everyday functionality
  • MACHINE WASHABLE: Designed for convenient reuse, these cotton kitchen towels and dish cloths are machine washable, making them easy to clean and rotate through daily kitchen tasks
  • GREAT VALUE KITCHEN ESSENTIAL: A useful towel set for home kitchens, apartments, guest spaces, baking areas and entertaining, offering a practical alternative to disposable paper towels for routine cleanup
Specifications

Dishcloth Dimensions: 13" x 13"
Tea Towel Dimensions: 28" x 18"
